title: EPI Notification 2026 - Apply Online for 14 Assistant Manager, Senior Manager Posts
description: The Engineering Projects India Limited (EPIL) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 14 Assistant Manager and Senior Manager Jobs. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their B.E./B. Tech in Mechanical, Electrical, Civil Engineering can apply for the EPI Notification 2026 . The interested applicants can apply in online mode. Here we have mentioned the e...
